'''Qornah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] raised in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Qornah lived during the centuries of peace that marked the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic|Republic's Golden Age]]. [[Jedi training/Legends|Trained]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and achieving the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], Qornah was responsible for crafting a [[Qornah Holocron|famous]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]].<ref name="EOT">{{DoD|Echoes of the Jedi}}</ref>.

During his time in service to the Order, Master Qornah selected the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Kibh Jeen]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and the pair traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] together.<ref name="LFC">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref> Working together on several missions for the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Master Qornah and Padawan Jeen were dispatched to the planet [[Almas]] to investigate the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side emanations]] stemming from the world. Master Qornah was a noted warrior of the time, and was not fearful of what he would meet on the planet; his true shortcoming was his tendency to ignore the unpleasantness that spoils reality.<ref name="JvS" />

Master Qornah's lack of preparedness for the worst got the best of him on this trip as he failed to notice that Padawan Jeen's mind had been assaulted by the dark side's thrall. While he had his back to Jeen, the young Jedi slew his master before he could recognize the danger he was in, and the investigation did not take place.<ref name="LFC" />
